optional_improvements: Add one UI-level interaction test (manual script or browser automation) for vocabulary bulk actions + statistics refresh to complement current build/static wiring checks.
Prevent duplicate stage reruns by adding an orchestrator guard that skips CODE/TEST/REVIEW when task_id is already in terminal DONE with matching artifacts.
summary: Implementation is correct and ready to ship for Phase 2: statistics and vocabulary-management scope is already present and validated; this review run is effectively a no-op confirmation with passing build and regression checks.
